channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Transport strike affecting Olympic test event underscores risks facing Milan-Cortina Games
item.description: ROME (AP) — A transport strike during an official test event for the Milan-Cortina Olympics highlighted why organizers are negotiating with trade unions to avoid a similar scenario during next year's Winter Games.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Caitlin Clark may never be paid what 'she's really worth' to WNBA, agent says
item.description: Indiana Fever sharpshooter Caitlin Clark's true worth may never be paid to her in the WNBA, an agent said in an interview with ESPN on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Excitement builds for US-Canada 4 Nations final after raucous 1st game
item.description: Team USA and Canada will meet in the 4 Nations Face-Off final on Thursday night in Boston after a raucous first game had almost everything a hockey fan could want.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Team USA falls to Sweden; still set to face Canada in 4 Nations Face-Off final
item.description: Team USA fell to Sweden in its final round-robin matchup of the 4 Nations Face-Off, though their six points still puts them in the final against Canada on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Flagg has 17 points and 14 rebounds as No. 3 Duke beats Virginia 80-62
item.description: CHARLOTTESVILLE, Va. (AP) — Freshman star Cooper Flagg had 17 points and 14 rebounds, notching his seventh double-double of the season before halftime, as No. 3 Duke cruised past Virginia 80-62 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: MIKE BARBER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: D-backs, SS Geraldo Perdomo agree to $45 million, 4-year deal that starts in 2026, AP source says
item.description: Slick-fielding shortstop Geraldo Perdomo has agreed to a $45 million, four-year contract with the Arizona Diamondbacks that begins in 2026, a person familiar with the deal told The Associated Press on Monday.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Cam Ward has answer for anyone who thinks he quit on Miami after breaking TD record in bowl game
item.description: Cam Ward says not playing in the second half of Miami's bowl game was a predetermined decision and that he'd do it the same way again.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Hawkins, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Boston crowd boos Canadian national anthem after Team USA heard same jeers during 4 Nations Face-Off
item.description: A Boston crowd returned the favor of boos during Canada's national anthem after Team USA dealt with it in Montreal over the weekend in the 4 Nations Face-Off.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Canadian national anthem booed, but only lightly, at 4 Nations hockey tournament
item.description: The Canadian national anthem was lightly booed by the fans at the 4 Nations Face-Off on Monday in apparent payback for the jeering of “The Star-Spangled Banner” during the opening rounds in Montreal last week.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Eagles player declines actor’s offer to pay Super Bowl fine
item.description: Actor and Eagles fan Rob McElhenny, best known for co-creating and starring in FXX’s “It’s Always Sunny in Philadelphia,” had recently offered to foot the bill for a fine incurred by Eagles player Jalyx Hunt during Super Bowl LIX.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, WGN 9

item.title: William Byron speaks to NewsNation after Daytona 500 win
item.description: Byron made sure to celebrate his victory, sleeping for an hour before returning to Daytona International Speedway on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: The idea of a US vs. World matchup in the NBA All-Star Game has some player support
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Victor Wembanyama has already gone up against the U.S. in international events, most notably last year's Paris Olympics when he led France's march to the gold medal game against the Americans. He'd like to be in that position more often — maybe even annually.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: College student Jaren Barajas beats Damian Lillard in 3-point shooting contest, wins $100K
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Jaren Barajas shoots on his backyard hoop maybe once a month these days. He's a busy 18-year-old college student now, so basketball has taken a backburner to academics.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: William Byron avoids late wrecks to win 2nd straight Daytona 500 for Hendrick Motorsports
item.description: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla (AP) — William Byron fortuitously missed the ferocious wrecks down the stretch at the Daytona 500 that knocked out contenders racing for the checkered flag and left him with a repeat victory in sight.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: William Byron avoids late wrecks to win 2nd straight Daytona 500
item.description: Ninth in the No. 24 Chevrolet with one lap left, Byron was in the right place by racing near the outside wall in overtime to became the first back-to-back winner since Denny Hamlin in 2019-20.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: NBA All-Star 2025 schedule of events
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The NBA All-Star weekend gets underway Friday with games, events and activations set to take place in and around San Francisco for the next several days.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: White Sox sign veteran CF Michael A. Taylor to 1-year deal
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Center fielder Michael A. Taylor and the Chicago White Sox have agreed to a $1.95 million, one-year contract. Chicago announced the agreement Wednesday. Taylor spent last season with the Pittsburgh Pirates, batting .193 with five home runs, 21 RBI and a .543 OPS in 113 games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz turn the tables on Lakers in 131-119 victory
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - What a difference 48 hours make. On Monday, the L.A. Lakers blew away the Utah Jazz in Luka Doncic' Laker debut. But Wednesday in Salt Lake City, it was all Jazz.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Egor Demin leads BYU past West Virginia, 73-69
item.description: MORGANTOWN, W.V. (ABC4 Sports) - Freshman Egor Demin scored 16 points to lead BYU to a 73-69 win over West Virginia on Tuesday night. Kanon Catchings added 11 points for BYU (16-8, 7-6 Big 12). "Gutsy win by our guys," said BYU head coach Kevin Young.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boxing mogul in talks to stage fight at Alcatraz in San Francisco
item.description: (KRON) -- Five years ago, no one would have thought YouTuber Jake Paul would get in the ring last fall with Mike Tyson -- who is a boxing legend but has been retired for nearly 20 years.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Ex-49er Dana Stubblefield freed from prison after rape conviction overturned
item.description: (AP) -- A judge has granted the release of former San Francisco 49er Dana Stubblefield after his 2020 rape conviction was vacated by a California appeals court last December.
item.dc:creator: JAIMIE DING, Associated Press, KRON4
